title: iberis sempervirens
intro: Iberis sempervirens, also known as rock rose, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its delicate pink to white flowers and glossy green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of saponins and other bioactive compounds. Rock rose is valued for its potential health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting better sleep. Herbal preparations of Iberis sempervirens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the skin for its therapeutic effects.
